architecture.summary: Node.js http + React 19 Vite Tailwind SPA bundled to dist/eval-ui/. Backend router pattern from specweave dashboard. LLM via existing llm.ts multi-provider.

integrations.summary: LLM via existing llm.ts (claude-cli, anthropic, ollama). No new external services. Filesystem-based persistence.

ui-ux.summary: SPA with eval case CRUD, inline assertion editing, benchmark results with regression detection, blind comparator view, activation test report.

performance.summary: N/A - local-first single-user dev tool. No concurrent users or performance SLAs.

security.summary: N/A - local dev tool, no auth, no PII, no network exposure beyond localhost.

edge-cases.summary: LLM timeout/failure handling, malformed evals.json recovery, concurrent file writes from CLI vs UI, empty plugin dirs.
